title: Riff Wakes Donny
startingLocation: Donny's office above a Dust-9 repair garage

beats.text: Camera pans from Nova and the Red Concord court down to tiny Dust-9.
Dust storm outside. Donny sleeps at his desk. The Astro Van is parked below in the garage.
Riff rolls in carrying a blinking signal receiver.

beats.speaker: Donny
beats.text: Riff, if this is about the toaster learning swear words again, let it grow.

beats.speaker: Riff
beats.text: Not toaster. Signal. Outer rim encryption. Dex signature. Broken. Repeating. Scared.

beats.speaker: Dex
beats.text: Donny... this is not a storm. It is feedback. It starts under Dust-9. Red Concord knows. Nova is listening. Bring the van. Trust Riff. Do not answer the return signal.
